case_title: EDMONDS + LEE ARCHITECTS VS. YELENA GOLDUBER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $97.50 - SERVED NOV-13-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDUBER, YELENA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDMONDS + LEE ARCHITECTS AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDUBER, YELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF EDMONDS & LEE ARCHITECTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROBERT EDMONDS, PRINCIPAL ARCHITECTS. DEFENDANT YELENA GOLDUBER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDMONDS + LEE ARCHITECTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDMONDS + LEE ARCHITECTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDUBER, YELENA $960.00 PRINCIPAL, $147.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,107.50, THE SIGNED CONTRACT WITH RINALDI CONSTRUCTION FROM BEFORE CONSTRUCTION BEGAN SETS THE CONSTRUCTION COST PAYMENT. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT THE PRE-CONSTRUCTION AGREEMENT WAS FOR MORE THAN 1.201 MILLION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
